aboutGame.title: What is Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3?
paragraphs: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 is a new story-driven Dragon Ball action-adventure set in AGE 1000, where players create their own hero and explore a future version of West City. It continues the Xenoverse formula with a fresh setting, a new cast, and a stronger focus on role-playing progression.

Official materials describe high-speed combat, city exploration, and race-dependent battle options. The June 2026 gameplay reveal also confirmed Soul Assist and Soul Switch, two new combat hooks designed to make each fight feel more tactical and more character-driven.

explore.title: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 Guide Modules
explore.description: Jump into release details, gameplay systems, characters, trailers, story context, and launch-prep guides for Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3.

modules.name: dragon ball xenoverse 3 Release Date
modules.description: Track the release window, supported platforms, developer, and publisher for Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3. Bandai Namco has announced a 2027 launch, while the exact release date remains reserved for official updates.

highlights.label: Release Window
highlights.detail: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 is officially scheduled for release in 2027.

highlights.label: Platforms
highlights.detail: The confirmed platforms are PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC via Steam.

highlights.label: Developer
highlights.detail: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 is being developed by Dimps Corporation.

highlights.label: Publisher
highlights.detail: The game is published by Bandai Namco Entertainment.

modules.name: dragon ball xenoverse 3 Gameplay
modules.description: Explore the officially revealed combat, movement, and race-based gameplay mechanics. Xenoverse 3 expands the series' high-speed battles with aerial movement, Ki Attacks, Soul Assist, and Soul Switch abilities.

highlights.label: High-Speed Combat
highlights.detail: The game continues the Xenoverse series' fast-paced action combat with new ways to fight.

highlights.label: Aerial Movement
highlights.detail: Players can soar through West City and boost across battlefields during combat.

highlights.label: Ki Attacks
highlights.detail: Created heroes can unleash powerful energy-based Ki Attacks against enemies.

highlights.label: Race Abilities
highlights.detail: Combat options change depending on the selected race, with Saiyans and Earthlings offering different playstyles.

modules.name: dragon ball xenoverse 3 Characters
modules.description: Browse the returning Dragon Ball characters and original heroes confirmed for Xenoverse 3. The revealed cast includes Bulma, Gamma 1, and several characters making their franchise debut.

highlights.label: Bulma
highlights.detail: Bulma appears in the West City storyline and helps introduce the player to the new AGE 1000 setting.

highlights.label: Gamma 1
highlights.detail: Gamma 1 welcomes the player-created hero into the Great Saiya Squad.

highlights.label: Brett
highlights.detail: Brett is one of the original characters making a debut in Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3.

highlights.label: Lilica, ROM and Tap
highlights.detail: Lilica, ROM, and Tap are additional original characters confirmed for the new West City adventure.

modules.name: dragon ball xenoverse 3 Trailers
modules.description: Watch and review the official Xenoverse 3 announcement and gameplay reveals. The trailers introduce AGE 1000, West City, the Great Saiya Squad, character creation, and the new Soul combat mechanics.

highlights.label: Announcement Trailer
highlights.detail: The April 2026 reveal officially confirmed Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3, its AGE 1000 setting, and its 2027 release window.

highlights.label: Welcome to West City
highlights.detail: The June 23, 2026 trailer presented gameplay, West City University, Gamma 1, Bulma, and the Great Saiya Squad.

highlights.label: Combat Reveal
highlights.detail: The latest footage showed aerial movement, boosting, Ki Attacks, Soul Assist, and Soul Switch mechanics.

modules.name: dragon ball xenoverse 3 Character Creation
modules.description: Learn what has been shown about creating and developing the protagonist in Xenoverse 3. Players can create their own hero, select a race, and access combat options associated with that race.

highlights.label: Custom Hero
highlights.detail: Players become a protagonist they create rather than controlling only a fixed story character.

highlights.label: Race Selection
highlights.detail: The selected race affects the options available during combat.

highlights.label: Saiyan
highlights.detail: Saiyan characters can use the power of Super Saiyan in multiple forms.

highlights.label: Earthling
highlights.detail: Earthling characters are confirmed to provide a different playstyle from Saiyans.

modules.name: dragon ball xenoverse 3 Beginner Guide
modules.description: Follow the current launch-prep path from creating a hero to joining the Great Saiya Squad. This guide organizes the official gameplay information into a beginner-friendly route.

highlights.detail: Create the protagonist you want to embody in the new Dragon Ball world.
Choose a race, which determines some of the combat options available to your character.
Enter AGE 1000 and begin exploring the developed and vibrant West City.
Join the Great Saiya Squad and fight alongside familiar and original allies.
Use aerial movement, Ki Attacks, Soul Assist, and Soul Switch during battles.

modules.name: dragon ball xenoverse 3 Story
modules.description: Discover the AGE 1000 storyline and the role of the Great Saiya Squad. The game moves beyond the previous setting into a new story-driven Dragon Ball world centered on a developed West City.

highlights.label: AGE 1000
highlights.detail: The story takes place in a new future setting officially named AGE 1000.

highlights.label: West City
highlights.detail: West City has developed into a vibrant central hub filled with characters and new stories.

highlights.label: Great Saiya Squad
highlights.detail: The player-created protagonist is recruited into the Great Saiya Squad and fights alongside its allies.

highlights.label: Original World
highlights.detail: The setting includes unique original characters brought to life by Dragon Ball creator Akira Toriyama.

modules.name: dragon ball xenoverse 3 Soul Systems
modules.description: Understand the new Soul Assist and Soul Switch mechanics revealed for Xenoverse 3. These systems let the created hero fight alongside legendary allies or temporarily harness their power.

highlights.label: Soul Assist
highlights.detail: Soul Assist allows the player to unleash a powerful attack together with an ally from the Dragon Ball universe.

highlights.label: Soul Switch
highlights.detail: Soul Switch temporarily lets the protagonist harness a Dragon Ball character's soul, gain strength, and access new abilities.

highlights.label: Confirmed Souls
highlights.detail: Krillin, Piccolo, Vegeta, Future Trunks, and Tien have been shown as Soul Switch examples.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Quick answers to the most common questions about Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3.

items.question: What is Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3?
items.answer: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 is a story-driven Dragon Ball action-adventure where players create a hero, explore AGE 1000 West City, and join the Great Saiya Squad in a new adventure.

items.question: When does Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 release?
items.answer: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 has a 2027 launch window. The homepage release module tracks the official release date, platform, developer, and publisher details as they are announced.

items.question: What platforms is Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 coming to?
items.answer: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 is listed for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC via Steam, giving players clear console and PC launch options.

items.question: Which Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 race should beginners pick?
items.answer: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 ties combat options to race choice, so beginners should start with the hero fantasy and playstyle they want before comparing Saiyan, Earthling, and other race systems.

items.question: What are Soul Assist and Soul Switch in Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3?
items.answer: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 uses Soul Assist for team attacks with allies and Soul Switch to temporarily draw on a Dragon Ball character soul for extra power and abilities.
